name: Dr Ivan Gonzalez
focus: Ecohydrology • Land use change • Geospatial ecosystem modeling
bio: Iván González-Garzón is a researcher at Northern Arizona University specializing in ecohydrology, remote sensing, and land use change. His work focuses on applying geospatial analysis and Earth observation data to study environmental dynamics and ecosystem processes. He has developed tools such as the Ecological Integrity Index, which uses satellite data to assess spatial and temporal changes in ecosystems. His research integrates remote sensing, spatial modeling, and quantitative ecology to better understand how landscapes respond to climate and human-driven change.
